## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Load example '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / error output

If applicable, add screenshots or paste the error message.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
